spec: f2b-transfer STAGE-2 harness RunSpec — ground-truth-independence test of the verifier-offload lift (frozen design record: registry/experiments/f2b-transfer.json, frozen_sha256 b341a0901e12023d3c56bdc196be0b9c492c7d348f988416d7e9c43aade20879). This manifest pins the harness INPUTS only; it may not change any frozen design field or threshold. PINNING DIRECTION: the frozen record's pins.harness_manifest is a declared PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder filled by ops amendment with the staged-bytes manifest sha printed by poc/f2b-transfer/modal/modal_f2bt.py BEFORE any final-phase run; this file therefore must NOT contain that sha (circular) and must NOT contain the record's frozen_sha256 pin chain beyond the reference above.

analysis_script.sha256: PINNED-IN-REGISTRY-RECORD (85a8fde6ea0b55e88f799e15399801bf23d55950159addf291baef7c084a6c93 in the frozen record; the frozen record is authoritative)

pins.pinSources: dqatCorpusKotHash / dxifCorpusKotHash / kernelV0KotHash / moleculesV0KotHash = frozen record pins.corpus_hashes verbatim; dadjtCorpusKotHash = registry/amendments/f2b-transfer/1-pin-d-adj-t-corpus.json (the ops amendment that filled the declared PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder); file-level shas computed from the committed bytes those corpus digests cover (sha256sum, 2026-07-11)
pins.perItemRecordSha256: every d-qa-t item carries record_path + record_sha256; the verifier re-hashes the canonical record file at use and fails closed (ERR_RECORD_PIN) on mismatch — the shuffled verifier verifies the PERMUTED record's pin the same way
pins.adjInternalConsistency: the runner additionally fail-closes on: summary.json labels_sha256 != sha256(labels.jsonl) (ERR_ADJ_PIN); count of resolved gold_ext lines != summary n_ext_labelled (ERR_ADJ_COUNTS); eval-prefix length != summary n_eval_items on real runs (ERR_ADJ_COUNTS); any d-qa-t item id missing from labels.jsonl (ERR_LABELS_MISSING)

R1.pinned_by: registry/experiments/f2b-transfer.json pins.model_revisions (pinned directly at design time; same revision as f2b-replicate)

R3.pinned_by: registry/experiments/f2b-transfer.json pins.model_revisions (pinned directly at design time; same revision as f2b-replicate)

models.prm: NO PRM IN THIS DESIGN (frozen record pins.model_revisions._note; dropped_arms: trained-PRM stays closed at and indexed to the 1.5B class of f2b-replicate)

eval_set.rule: EVAL SET = the first per_arm_items (250) externally-labelled items of data/d-qa-t/items/covered.jsonl in pinned rank order — externally-labelled means labels.jsonl gold_ext != null (unresolved judge disagreements and concordant-escape CONTENT-UNDECIDED items carry gold_ext null and are EXCLUDED); deterministic prefix, no sampling; floor eval_floor (200), below which the runner refuses (ERR_EVAL_FLOOR). Verbatim from the frozen record design.stage_discipline / design.n_planned.fresh_items and design.md section 5.
eval_set.dual_scoring: every arm cell scores EVERY eval item BOTH ways on the SAME final answers: item_correct_ext against gold_ext (data/d-adj-t/labels.jsonl — every endpoint) AND item_correct_mem against the item's membership answer field (descriptive contrast only; never an endpoint)

shuffle.algorithm: Sattolo cyclic permutation over the sorted covered-concept urns of the full d-qa-t covered set via random.Random(perm_seed) — a derangement by construction (no concept maps to its own record); asserted fixed-point-free at build; the realized urn->record map + its sha256 are written to shuffle-map.json in the results directory and the sha is emitted on every shuffled-arm record
shuffle.seed_note: the frozen record requires a seed-pinned derangement with the map recorded but does not fix the integer; this manifest pins perm_seed = 20260710 (the record's published sap_prng_seed) — an INPUT pin, recorded here and on every shuffled record
shuffle.note: the shuffled-kernel-verify-retry arm is the LOAD-BEARING oracle-structure control carried over from f2b-replicate: identical retry topology and cost, record CONTENT decoupled from the item; the frozen record names it the one control NOT to cut

design_constants_from_frozen_record.note: copied VERBATIM from registry/experiments/f2b-transfer.json for runner convenience; the frozen record is authoritative. Arms: model-alone R1/R3, kernel-verify-retry R1 k=4, shuffled-kernel-verify-retry R1 k=4, gloss-self-verify-retry R1 k=4, extraction-instrument R1 (CPU); the adjudication-instrument stage-1 record is ALREADY in the results log and is NEVER re-emitted by a real run.

engagement_gate.note: RT-7a made structural; evaluated by the pinned analysis over the emitted verifier_engagement blocks, INSTRUMENT-INVALID on failure — the runner only EMITS the block, it never gates

arm_plan.retry_final_answer: last attempt (accepted or budget-exhausted); pre-declared, no post-hoc pick; identical rule for kernel-verify, shuffled-verify and gloss-self-verify arms (carried verbatim from f2b-replicate)
arm_plan.shared_affordance: P10 IF-C constrained decoding for EVERY arm: answers produced by constrained selection over the pinned option set (A-D or yes/no) via sequence logprob; arms differ ONLY in verification instrument — no context-block arm exists in this design (kernel-as-text dropped)
arm_plan.dropped_arms_note: trained-PRM, kernel-as-text and the d-ext external slice are DROPPED per the frozen record's dropped_arms (HC3 closed at the 1.5B class; Law-2 passive null settled; d-ext measured degenerate — replaced by this experiment's entire externally-adjudicated eval set); R2 / gold-oracle / k-ladder / cascades / int4 / RAG / self-consistency stay dropped from the replicate right-size
arm_plan.engagement_block: every kernel-verify-retry cell (and, informatively, every shuffled-verify cell) emits verifier_engagement = {n_items, n_decidable, n_attempt0_rejected, n_final_differs_attempt0}; n_decidable and n_attempt0_rejected are attempt-0 facts; n_final_differs_attempt0 counts items whose final answer differs from attempt 0

prompt_frames.qa_prefix: Answer the following question about the meaning of a word.
prompt_frames.frames_note: byte-identical to poc/f2b/inputs/f2b-manifest.json prompt_frames — the instrument is carried over unchanged (context_prefix/context_suffix retained for frame parity though no arm uses a context block here)

flop_accounting.formula: F0 section 3.3: FLOPs = 2*N_active*T_total + 2*L*T^2*d_attn per sequence; prefill and decode metered separately; T measured with the arm's own tokenizer
flop_accounting.cpu_note: CPU-side verifier work is metered as measured wall-clock seconds and converted at this pinned rate ONLY for the aggregate figure; wall-clock is reported separately (F0 section 3.3)
flop_accounting.usd_note: Modal list prices used for planning + $-per-query conversion; actual Modal billing reconciled from the dashboard at run time

planning.note: dry-plan ESTIMATES only — never emitted as measurements

mock.note: SYNTHETIC mechanics-only stub LM (no torch needed); every number it produces is labelled MOCK and never a measurement; the verifiers (true AND shuffled), extraction, dual scoring, engagement accounting, eval-set construction, flop-meter and emitter code paths are the REAL ones. The mock ALSO emits an adjudication-instrument record whose integers are copied verbatim from the pinned data/d-adj-t/summary.json so the pinned analysis pipeline can be validated end-to-end on the mock records file alone; that record is phase=mock and is NEVER log-appended (the REAL stage-1 record is already in results-log/f2b-transfer.jsonl).

inputs_status.d-qa-t: BUILT + pinned pre-freeze (data/d-qa-t/build-dqat.py, generator seed dqat/1|f2b-transfer|20260710): 360 FRESH kernel-covered kernel_checkable items over the 108 covered concepts; ID-disjoint (dqat: namespace) AND full-prompt-surface-disjoint from all 650 d-qa AND all 1000 d-qa-r items (LC8-t, fail-closed); the runner evaluates the deterministic externally-labelled rank prefix (per_arm_items=250)
inputs_status.d-adj-t: blind adjudication corpus, pinned by ops amendment 1 AFTER the stage-1 protocol run and BEFORE the stage-1 record (kot-corpus-hash a4baa36f...): labels.jsonl is the external gold (gold_ext per id; null = unresolved/undecided, EXCLUDED from the eval set); summary.json carries the stage-1 analysis-input integers the runner cross-checks
inputs_status.d-qa: reused for ONE purpose beyond the P10 gate: the pinned gloss corpus (gloss-self-verify arm) plus the original covered items the pinned d-xif labelled outputs reference; NO d-qa item is scored as an eval item
inputs_status.d-xif: reused from F2 (unchanged P10 gate): 500 covered real R1 outputs re-verified mechanically through THIS harness's extraction machinery; fail-closed pins
